passages.passage_text: Directions (Q. 60-64): Read the following information carefully and answer the questions given below: i) Six persons A, B, C, D, E and F are sitting in two rows, three in each. ii) F is not at the end of any row. iii) D is second to the left of E. iv) C, the neighbour of E, is sitting diagonally opposite to D. v) B is the neighbour of F.

Directions (Q. 65-69): Read the following information carefully and answer the questions given below: i) There are five friends - Shailendra, Keshav, Madhav, Ashish and Rakesh. ii) Shailendra is shorter than Keshav but taller than Rakesh. iii) Madhav is the tallest. iv) Ashish is a little shorter than Keshav and a little taller than Shailendra. v) Who is the shortest?
Directions (Q. 70-73): Read the following information carefully and answer the questions given below: In the branch of X, Z is the son of X, K the daughter of K, is married to G and X are sisters.

Directions (Q. 74-77): Read the following information carefully and answer the questions given below: In a car rally, cars of seven different companies, viz. Cardillac, Ambassador, Fiat, Maruti, Mercedes, Bedford and Fargo were displayed in a row, parked one behind the other in immediate right of Fargo.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following is definitely a group of male members? 1) QU 2) QUT 3) None of these 4) UT 5) QUP

questions.body: After interchanging seat with F, who will be the neighbour of D in the new position? 1) C and A 2) E and B 3) Only B 4) Only A 5) Only C

questions.body: How is P related to G? 1) Niece 2) Daughter 3) Daughter-in-law 4) Cousin 5) Sister

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Cardillac car is in the 1) Cardillac car is to the immediate right of Fiat. 2) Fargo was fourth to the right of Fiat and Bedford. 3) Maruti car was placed in the left of Ambassador car, was at one of the ends. 4) Fiat, which was the immediate neighbour of the Mercedes?

choices.b: Fourth to the right of Maruti
choices.d: Immediate left of Bedford and Fargo

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following cars was the ambassador and Fiat. 1) Fargo car is to the immediate right of Mercedes. 2) Cardillac car is to the immediate left of Mercedes. 3) Fargo car is placed to the immediate right of Cardillac. 4) Maruti car 5) None of these

choices.a: Fargo car is to the immediate right of Mercedes
choices.b: Cardillac car is to the immediate left of Mercedes
choices.c: Fargo car is placed to the immediate right of Cardillac
